# Taskboard master plan

Taskboard is a small kanban tool for one team. Done means: a new user can sign
up, create a board, and drag a card between columns, with the suite passing.

## Scope and non-goals

In scope: single-team boards. Non-goals: multi-tenancy (deferred), mobile app
(out of scope).

## Decisions

### D1: SQLite via drizzle for the first cut

Rationale: one team, one host. Rejected: Postgres (operational overhead now).

## Requirements

### Story 1: a member can manage cards

R-1.1: WHEN a member drags a card THE SYSTEM SHALL persist the new column.

## Phases

## Phase 1: Scaffold

Goal: repo builds and lints from a fresh clone. Blocks Phase 2.

### Wave 1.1

- [x] GP-101 [W1.1] Scaffold repo with lint and test wiring
  - Files: package.json, .eslintrc.json
  - Depends on: none
  - Acceptance: `npm test` and `npm run lint` both exit 0 on a fresh clone
  - Verify: `npm test && npm run lint`
  - Requirements: R-CODE-1

- [x] GP-102 [P] [W1.1] Add db client and empty schema
  - Files: src/db/client.ts, src/db/schema/index.ts
  - Depends on: none
  - Acceptance: schema module exports an empty table map; client connects to sqlite file
  - Verify: `npm run db:check`
  - Requirements: R-DB-1

## Phase 2: Auth and boards

Goal: a user can sign up and own a board. Blocks Phase 3.

### Wave 2.1

- [ ] GP-201 [W2.1] Create user model and migration
  - Files: src/db/schema/users.ts, migrations/0002_users.sql
  - Depends on: GP-102
  - Reuses: drizzle client from src/db/client.ts
  - Acceptance: schema exports users table; migration applies cleanly on empty db;
    email column has unique index
  - Verify: `npm run db:migrate && npm run db:check`
  - Requirements: R-2.1, R-DB-3, R-SEC-12

~~- [ ] GP-202 [W2.1] Add session table~~
  - Note (2026-06-28): superseded by GP-203; cookie sessions chosen instead.

- [ ] GP-203 [P] [W2.1] Add cookie session helper
  - Files: src/auth/session.ts, src/auth/session.test.ts
  - Depends on: none
  - Acceptance: uses signed httpOnly cookie; test vector passes
  - Verify: `npm test -- session.test.ts`
  - Requirements: R-SEC-6

Checkpoint: signup flow works end to end against a local db.

## Phase 3: Verification

Goal: prove the built system satisfies the plan end to end.

### Wave 3.1

- [ ] GP-301 [W3.1] Full suite, lint, build, end-to-end smoke
  - Files: none (runs existing checks)
  - Depends on: GP-201, GP-203
  - Acceptance: suite green, lint clean, build succeeds, smoke exercises signup
  - Verify: `npm test && npm run lint && npm run build && npm run smoke`
  - Requirements: R-1.1, R-CODE-1

Checkpoint: a fresh clone passes every check with one command sequence.

## Open Questions

None; every meaningful decision is committed above.

## Rules for executing agents

> [!IMPORTANT]
> This plan is the source of truth. The chat is not.
>
> 1. Before any work: read the frontmatter, then find the first unchecked task in wave order.
> 2. One task at a time. Respect Depends on.
> 3. Run the task's Verify command. Only after it passes, flip the checkbox.

## Session log

- 2026-06-20 plan created (godplans v1.0.0)
- 2026-06-29 GP-101 and GP-102 done; Phase 1 checkpoint reached.
